Built for Africa, on Solana

One app.
Every way money
moves in Africa.

Trade, get paid, sell online, send to any Nigerian bank, and earn yield — all from one wallet built around how money actually moves here.

1%merchant fee
NGNdirect bank payout
24/7P2P market

How it works

From download to your first transaction, in four steps.

No paperwork, no waiting on approval. Your wallet is ready the moment you open the app.

01

Download & create your wallet

Get ChatFi and your Solana wallet is generated on your device — no forms, no ID upload to start.

02

Fund it your way

Buy crypto on the P2P market with Opay, Palmpay, Moniepoint or bank transfer, or receive from another wallet.

03

Pick what you need

Trade tokens, open a store, accept payments, send to a bank, stake for yield, or launch your own token.

04

Cash out anytime

Send USDC straight to any Nigerian bank account through Orbit — no third-party exchange needed.

Store

Your storefront.
Live in minutes.

store.chatfi.pro/yourname — yours, shareable, sellable.

Merchant

Accept payments.
Anywhere you build.

1% per transaction. Webhooks. A real API.

Pay Link

Get paid.
With a single link.

No store, no setup. Just a link, and you're paid.

Token Creation

Launch a token.
On our own curve.

Built and owned by ChatFi. Tradable from the first buyer.

Earn

Yield, routed
through Jupiter.

Real APY across JupUSD, USDC, SOL, USDT, and more.

P2P

Buy and sell.
With real people, in Naira.

Opay. Palmpay. Moniepoint. Bank transfer. Your call.

Orbit

From USDC.
To your bank account.

Any Nigerian bank. No exchange detour.

Also built in

Everyday money, handled in the same app.

Bills

Pay for airtime, data, electricity, and cable TV straight from your wallet balance. ChatFi earns a small commission — never an extra charge to you.

Predictions

Take a position on sports, crypto, and political outcomes directly from your portfolio — alongside your tokens, not in a separate app.

Everything you need, already in your pocket.

Trade, get paid, sell, send to your bank, and earn — one app, built for how money moves here.
